goals.statement: Be more concise in advising emails; reduce average response length by 30%.
goals.current_state: Average reply 320 words; students often ask follow-ups.
goals.success_signal: Average reply ≤ 220 words and follow-up rate down by 25%.

goals.statement: Lead one cross-team workshop on FERPA-safe documentation by end of Q2.
goals.current_state: Have presented in team meetings only.
goals.success_signal: Workshop delivered; >75% of attendees report it useful in survey.

goals.statement: Protect 2 hours of focus time per day, 4 days a week.
goals.current_state: Calendar fragmented; deep work happens after 5pm.
goals.success_signal: Calendar shows 8+ focus blocks/week; reduced after-hours work.

reflection_prompts: What is one thing that worked well this week?
Where did you feel resistance, and what did it teach you?
Which conversation would you handle differently next time?
What is the smallest next step toward your top goal?
Who do you owe thanks or feedback to?
